title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 1108 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 889-7279 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-7279 Angelica Resendiz [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation services by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME VISITING PROGRAMS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEAT INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
